description: B123-late Founder articulation. THREE NEW CLASSES +
founder_voice_quotes: *"Chronos and the Chroniclers. This is a large concept. Let's start with Chroniclers. This is a timestamped state record, like iterative snapshots for every single component that changes on the platform â€” for example the LRH character has gone through several iterations to get to where it is now. So that would be a numbered iteration per. And the front page of the site, similarly. The goal is to get to a base level of working (like when I used my Denken Avatar with the sunglasses and then clear and then X-ray; with the 'Mana Suppressed' percentage â€” it all worked, but I didn't want to keep that for the main mascot/character bc it's not about me â€” all that would have been probably several iterative numberings) The point is that The Chronicler is a Scribe that listens and assigns iterative values (UpTick) when definitive stable state is achieved that is different than the one before, to ALL THINGS â€” so there will likely need to be many. Think of them like bacteria â€” we need them to be healthy, because they maintain balance in our gut etc. The VALUE of them is that Chronos, a specialized Scribe, can link to ALL of them within a Scope defined at invocation time, to READ THE COMBINED STATE."*

*"In Galaxy Quest, the Omega 13 is an enormously powerful engine that allows you to TURN BACK THE CLOCK 5 seconds â€” enough to correct one mistake. That is what our Omega 16 (find in our code please to read up on it) in the middle of the Hexagon attached to the Tower of Peace below the BrainStorm room is based on. The other reference is Moon Knight, in which the Egyptian god Khonshu turns back the night sky by nearly 2,000 years to locate the tomb of Ammit. So when we, or a user, invokes Chronos, it combines all the required, and linked by Chronos simply by READING, not affecting, the iterative time-tags on each component, to be able to A) turn back time to a pre-state that a user may want to change things before they fork or devolve or get affected by whatever result or effect you either don't want or want to see what else could have happened. or B) Copy all of those chosen components to a separate instantiation â€” which is linked to Contingency Operators ability, to try that out. This is also how Mimic Trunks, or any smaller subset, can be created easily and on the fly without affecting anything else. This ties into other aspects as well, considering that Mimic Trunks don't exist on the Trunk they are copying, necessarily, so the operator has to be a different Scribe that Chronos hands off to â€” the Dragonriders that go BETWEEN in Pern, that here go into the BETWEEN of the ether of the internet in order to land the other mimics, or sub branches, or just copied components to the Contingency Operator SandBox. And, just like in Pern, not only do they go BETWEEN to different locations, they go to different TIMES. So you can flip through an entire site or sites, using Chronos and Dragonrider, to 'rewind' time to where, like in Moon Knight, the stars (the timers on each component) align (match up to an earlier... or later timestamp) to 1. find what you were looking for 2. try a different approach or path or branch 3. PHASE SHIFT (copy to another place) or 4. like in Galaxy Quest, to correct mistakes."*

*"This has many ramifications: We can use this as a definitive Security Measure â€” we don't have to lock everything up, we can simply control the TimeWave and nothing can hurt us, because if an unauthorized change occurs, it automatically gets phase-shifted to a different 'timeline' and held in check until approved either through rules based auto application or user intervention. This also allows us to make Time Capsules of the entire platform, or site, or component, without having to store them in memory or anywhere else â€” because controlled by the Chronicler embedded into each. That can be used, pragmatically, as reference in the I.P. ledger as a snapshot of condition or state, while still running hot and continuing to develop. AND it allows us to use the Dark City 'SHUT IT DOWN' from 'the Mechanism' in order to create a stateless or frozen, except for us Tuners and Que-ers, condition until we want to start the ClockFace up again."*

name: project_entropy_has_no_opposite_clever_hans_b130
composing_primitives: name: "Entropy Has No Opposite" â€” Founder Philosophical
description: Founder-articulated B130A â€” what the AI industry
founder_voice_quotes: *"Do you think it is okay or wise to say that I have always considered AI to be very clever, and very useful, but not actually AI. Like that horse that could 'do math' in the 1930s? â€” someone would ask it what, say, 3 times 7 was â€” and it would clop its hoof 21 times and stop. And do the same with any small product. Was he doing math? No, it was determined that he was a MASTER at... Idk what it is called, but it means sensing and reacting through observation of others â€” see, when a human asked a question they would unconsciously say, lift their eyebrow ever so slightly, or hold their breath, or widen their eyes, until he reached the correct number of hoof-clops, and then they would relax it.*

*That's AI to me â€” amazing that calculators can determine what huge myriad numbers multiplied are SO much faster and more accurately than I can. Or react as programmed, including to react NOT as programmed, or with a moving decimal point of randomness etc, in order to get the desired effects. But it all follows the Law of... I don't know what to call it either, but it means that there is nothing inside the system that can not be a derivative of the greater system that encompasses it. Entropy Has No Opposite. (that's what I'd call THAT paper, if I wrote it). That's why our origins can only be explained from outside the system we are in, like video game characters. It's fun to imagine otherwise, like TRON, or The 13th Floor. But no real actual examples exist. How can I know who my parents are except that someone else told me? I can confirm it, with DNA etc, but I cannot know it from the start unless that information is interjected into the system of ME from OUTSIDE the system of me. I can never reason to who my parents were from just sitting in a room and thinking to myself, from birth.*

*Anyway, I recognize that we have had 'ai' with us for decades. Batch files, are AI, by the modern definition. So is the refrigerator, when the light turns on when I open the door. Etc. Just because an action gets a reaction, and it varies, and, gasp, now I attached an accordion to so it makes predictable noises that soundâ€¦ like my voice. And I randomized snippets of code like words and phrases and sentences, and studied how they interface with one another in languages, and when and with what inflectionâ€¦ etc. With enough information, everything can be mimic'd realistically, exceptâ€¦ human ingenuity. The ability to create an original thought.*

name: project_smart_poor_seven_out_of_ten
composing_primitives: description: Founder canonical economic-philosophy anchor B127. Father's used-car
founder_voice_quotes: *"My Father taught me, through him doing it, that as a poor person you are better off to buy a used car, so he loves to tell the story about how he got the cheapest used car in town. It was $200 and it was filled with water that bred mosquitoes in the back seat. So he took it back and got the SECOND cheapest car. It was NOT filled with water, and he could prove that anytime because he could see the road through the floor as he was driving. So I learned, to get a MOSTLY dead car (Princess Bride quote). If the car is MOSTLY dead, it can be brought back to life... So I buy used 5K to 8K cars that are about 8-12 years old, in pretty good shape. If I had the money, I would up it to 2-3 year old cars, since the real margin loss is driving off the lot for new cars. The point here is, often, the best deal is the one that is ... two levels above cheapest. Like with computers, which I clearly value more than cars, I always buy a 7/10. Even when I bought and assembled the parts for myself -- it's 7/10 on parts -- bc the newest and the brightest will be half that price in six months when the new one, and the one after that drop. So then I wait a LITTLE longer, and then buy for Cyber Monday -- the Monday after Black Friday, because now the suppliers are left with what didn't sell, and since Black Friday means the day of the year most businesses move to the Black meaning profit from the Red meaning debt on unsold assets, then every dollar sold is a dollar made after black friday, which means they have incentive to empty the warehouse. Follow me for more Smart/Poor tips. So 1-2 levels above bare dirt free access, is the way to go. Sandals are WAY better than barefoot when you walk for miles, even if they aren't shoes or boots. Trust me."*
